expected.notes: STEM OPT student with 2 years in US (is_nra=yes) reports foreign accounts; neq condition satisfied so rule fires with FBAR warning.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'foreign_accounts_fbar_risk'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.has_foreign_accounts eq yes
  - answers.is_nra neq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
